### Issue URL (Annoyance) [https://www.deepl.com/en/translator](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.deepl.com%2Fen%2Ftranslator) ### Comment > Isn't all of this just self-promotion? issue.title: adguard.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://adguard.com/pl/compare.html?os=windows&aid=29450&clid=T7P0CU--NHugKj--bWvIBT--PbOyaf--MVyKQU&utm_campaign=compare&utm_medium=popup&utm_source=browser_extension](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fadguard.com%2Fpl%2Fcompare.html%3Fos%3Dwindows%26aid%3D29450%26clid%3DT7P0CU--NHugKj--bWvIBT--PbOyaf--MVyKQU%26utm_campaign%3Dcompare%26utm_medium%3Dpopup%26utm_source%3Dbrowser_extension) ### Comment > gram w agame, od kilku dni pojawia się pusty ekran po włączeniu adguard tak w aplikacji jak i rozszerzeniu. > pozdrawiam Jola > mail `molinezja18@gmail.com` ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/37vaxmqb1uw48gwoskw48kss4so8wsslmiha16yj80.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 2 ![Screenshot 2](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/a1e4kuviz7s40wcgcok8wc8g4ssg0k4gjsn0hc8mgg.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/1vk64uc8d9ogw4wk0scsgo8c8ko004ct2q0mjy8wlw.png?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard Browser Extension v5.4.3.105 MV3 System version: | `Windows 11` Browser: | Chrome Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter

**Language-specific:**
Official Polish filters for AdBlock, uBlock Origin & AdGuard,
Polish Anti Adblock Filters Filters last update: | 2026-07-22T08:00:36Z ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?scheme_version=4&product_type=ext&product_version=5.4.3.105&system_version=Windows+11&ext.manifest_version=3&browser=chrome&regular_filters=2%2C216%2C238&filters_last_update=2026-07-22T08%3A00%3A36Z&stealth.enabled=0)

访问后，会重引导至https://www.agame.com/#theatermode

>@gmail.com

发现隐私信息，请求在问题处理完成后移除。

issue.title: mangafire.to

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Ads) [https://mangafire.to/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmangafire.to%2F) ### Comment > Whenever I click an in-site button or whenever I click something on MangaFire, it redirects me to this other site that doesn’t even load up. This happens about every one hour or so and it’s something that AdGuard has not yet blocked. This happened after MangaFire got a maintenance update, and I first removed my history then I updated my AdGuard to make sure ads or redirects appeared, but it seems AdGuard has missed one. > > Please give AdGuard an update to fix this issue, and let me know when the update is done by emailing me. If you further information, let me know. Thank you. ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/so4zr2bmuvkcwosggs8kcoogkw8so8kpi8s7s8qq9c.jpg?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard for iOS v4.5.21 License type: | paid Advanced protection: | enabled Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter,
AdGuard Mobile Ads filter

**Privacy:**
AdGuard Tracking Protection filter,
EasyPrivacy,
Peter Lowe's Blocklist

**Social Widgets:**
AdGuard Social Media filter

**Annoyances:**
AdGuard Annoyances filter,
AdGuard Cookie Notices filter,
AdGuard Popups filter,
AdGuard Mobile App Banners filter,
AdGuard Other Annoyances filter,
AdGuard Widgets filter,
Fanboy's Annoyances

**Other:**
Filter unblocking search ads and self-promotion DNS filtering: | server: `System`, `default`, `(Regular)`
filters: `https://filters.adtidy.org/dns/filter_1_ios.txt` Other extensions used: | `AdGuard`

comment.body:
> This rule blocks an ad on my end `mangafire.to##body > a[href][target="_blank"][style*="z-index: 99999"]`
> 
> Please try following actions, then check the problem again:
> 
> 1. Disable all content blockers in Safari settings and enable them again;
> 2. Restart Safari;
> 3. Restart AdGuard;
> 4. Check for filters update in AdGuard.
> 
> ### Important:
> 
> * Do not close AdGuard window ~60 seconds, because iOS will break configuration process.

Do I go to the AdGuard app and then disable and then renable the content blockers in Safari settings. Please clarify.

How do I restart Safari and AdGuard? Please clarify.
